claimText: UT Austin classroom guidance recommends that instructors requiring generative AI understand and abide by UT acceptable-use guidance, identify syllabus policies clearly, and submit specific software requirements through the University Co-Op.
normalizedValue: Classroom-required AI use guidance addresses acceptable use, syllabus notice, and course-material reporting.

citation.citationTitle: Requiring Generative AI in the Classroom - Office of the Executive Vice President and Provost
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
